ddls:
CREATE TABLE "multiplexes" (
  "multiplex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multiplex */,
  "licence_area" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the multiplex license */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the multiplex operator */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel assigned to the multiplex */,
  "on_air_date" TEXT /* Date when the multiplex went on air */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region covered by the multiplex */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency allocated to the multiplex */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth allocated to the multiplex */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the multiplex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multiplex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radio_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radio station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the radio station */,
  "format" TEXT /* Broadcast format or genre of the station */,
  "on_air_date" TEXT /* Date when the station went on air */,
  "multiplex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the multiplex hosting the station */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the station owner */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music or content broadcasted by the station */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used by the station */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the station */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radio_stations_format FOREIGN KEY ("format") REFERENCES station_formats ("format_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radio_stations_multiplex_id FOREIGN KEY ("multiplex_id") REFERENCES multiplexes ("multiplex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radio station broadcasting the content */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program or content */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., music, news, talk) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the program */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., music, news, talk show) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in minutes */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail image of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_content_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format or genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format or genre */,
  "bitrate" REAL /* Bitrate of the format */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the format */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Codec used by the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, content manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, modify station) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_multiplex_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radio station */,
  "multiplex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the multiplex hosting the station */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the station started broadcasting on the multiplex */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the station stopped broadcasting on the multiplex (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_multiplex_mapping_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_multiplex_mapping_multiplex_id FOREIGN KEY ("multiplex_id") REFERENCES multiplexes ("multiplex_id")
)
